name: The Seeing Gift
description: You just got hit by lightning and you are now able to see 1 or 2 words hinting at what people actually want in that moment written on their forehead. You are suddenly hired at an amazing school in Japan. They have the best most state of the art everything, they are even willing to pay you 100k a year to coach any sport you like. However they forgot to mention the students and faculty are all women. How will you navigate your days and use your seeing gift.
creator: Degen13
